title: fastapi-rag-kit
pitch: Drop-in FastAPI utilities for RAG endpoints with citations, caching, and eval hooks.
keyFeatures: Pydantic models for RAG requests, citations, and tool results
Streaming SSE responses with standardized chunk schema
Built-in tracing hooks for prompt, context, and latency
Minimal eval harness: golden-set checks for groundedness and citation coverage
targetUsers: FastAPI developers shipping production RAG chat/search endpoints who need consistent request/response patterns.
